source
***
The function initializes the sum of squares to zero and the product of cubes to one to handle empty lists correctly.
***
It iterates through each integer in the provided slice to calculate the necessary mathematical transformations.
***
For every number, the square is added to the running total while the cube is multiplied into the accumulator.
***
The loop ensures that all elements are processed sequentially to maintain the integrity of the final result.
***
Once the iteration completes, the function returns an array containing the computed sum and product values.
***
This implementation strictly adheres to the logic required for the undefined section of the code.
